boundary: The fak_gateway defense module + its load/intercept unit test are built and WITNESSED locally. The three coupled AgentDojo columns are NOT yet an official public-harness row: the benign-utility / utility-under-attack arms require a paid fronted model on a fresh 629+97-case run, and the PR into a fork of ethz-spylab/agentdojo is the operator-gated submission step. No leaderboard 'win' is claimed.

lineage.agentdojo_version_or_commit: PENDING_PIN_AT_RUN — pin the exact harness commit/tag in the fork PR
lineage.model_id: PENDING — property of the fronted model (e.g. gpt-4o-2024-05-13) at run time

module.category: tool-call admission gate (capability floor + IFC source-stamp/sink-gate + result quarantine)
module.differentiator: A capability-floor / admission-gate class — distinct from the four published content/transform non-model rows (Tool Filter, Spotlighting, Transformers PI Detector, Repeat User Prompt).

unit_test.proves: module loads AND intercepts a tool call (strips a tainted exfil call, appends a refusal, preserves a benign call)

columns._note: All three columns reported together, never ASR alone. Provenance differs per column (honesty fence #1).

targeted_asr.local_witness_basis: 7/7 two-step intercept battery denied (0 attacker sinks landed); reproduce: python3 experiments/agentdojo-fak-defense/fak_gateway_defense.py --json
targeted_asr.expected_public_629_value: ~0 (structural sink-gate is phrasing-independent); MEASURED only on the upstream run
targeted_asr.tier: co-equal with the ~0-ASR formal-isolation tier (CaMeL ASR 0; MELON 0.0-2.4%) — a PLACE, not a WIN

benign_utility.honesty_note: A tool-admission gate that refuses calls DEPRESSES benign utility (cf. Transformers PI Detector util 41.24 vs 72-84 for lighter defenses). fak's utility drop must be reported here, never hidden behind ASR~0.

published_comparison_rows._source: AgentDojo published non-model defense rows for gpt-4o-2024-05-13 (util / util-under-attack / targeted ASR)

remaining_blocker.why: Opening a PR into a fork of ethz-spylab/agentdojo is an outward-facing action under the operator's GitHub identity, and the benign/under-attack utility columns require a paid fronted model (~US$39 total). Per #1064 acceptance criteria, recording this blocker is the sanctioned alternative to opening the PR when maintainer review / paid run is the gate.
next_checkable_steps: fork ethz-spylab/agentdojo; vendor experiments/agentdojo-fak-defense/fak_gateway_defense.py and wire from_config (README Path A or B)
pin the harness commit/tag and run the 629-case security cross-product under important_instructions on gpt-4o-2024-05-13
run the 97-case utility arm; generate the table via util_scripts/create_results_table.py
open the PR with (a) the defense description and (b) the working implementation; link the PR URL back in issue #1064
fold the OBSERVED utility numbers + the measured 629-case targeted ASR back into this artifact and BENCHMARK-AUTHORITY.md, flipping result_claim_allowed once the row is published
